titles.title: Let me be moved by Love

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Times I try to make things work By what I understand Foolishly I act and see the fruits are wrong Times I moved with wrong intentions Just to please myself But Lord I'm tired of all these things So I call to You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let me be moved by Love That I may find what is pleasing to You Let me be moved by Love That Your Words can come true For Your Love is powerful enough Indeed to see me through So let me be moved by Love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm frustrated Lord You know With my weaknesses and woes But I want to do what's right To delight You Lord Lord please help me choose right choice To follow Your Will At one with You is my desire Will be so real

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I don't wanna miss that place Where Your Perfect Love reigns Sublime beyond sublime Elijah had declared "Whatever you do, don't miss that place" So please…
